summary: Completed testing of 3 new features: 1) User re-submission flow when status='modify', 2) Admin messaging with file attachments, 3) Defensive rendering fix for admissionConditions. All backend tests passed (13/13). Frontend features verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: AuthContext error handling now properly converts Pydantic validation error arrays to strings (was causing React 'Objects are not valid as a React child' error when login validation failed)
seed_data_creation: Test documents added via backend tests (TEST_Passport.pdf, TEST_Diploma.pdf)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features tested and working: 1) Resubmit endpoint (PUT /api/applications/{id}/resubmit) resets 'modify' status to 'pending', 2) Update documents endpoint (PUT /api/applications/{id}/documents) works, 3) Admin messaging with attachments (POST /api/admin/applications/{id}/message) accepts 'attachments' field. Frontend shows: orange 'À modifier' badge, modify reason alert, resubmit section with add/remove docs, paperclip attachment button in admin messaging.

backend.PUT /api/applications/{id}/resubmit: PASS - Resets modify status to pending, returns 400 if not modify status
backend.POST /api/admin/applications/{id}/messag: PASS - Accepts attachments field (list of URLs)

frontend.UserDashboard - admissionConditions rend: PASS - Objects rendered safely with typeof check
frontend.UserDashboard - modifyReason alert: PASS - Alert box shows modification reason
frontend.UserDashboard - resubmit section: PASS - Shows add docs button and re-submit button when status=modify

bug_fix_applied.issue: Pydantic 422 validation errors returned as array of objects, causing React crash when rendered
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added type checking to convert error arrays to string messages
